sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72689" key="oi)suoplo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰσῠοπλόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plaiting osier-twigs,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:175" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.175</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
